# Boss Queens Collection — Complete Brand & Product Knowledge

> Premium 100% virgin human hair wigs, bundles, frontals, closures and accessories. Black-owned beauty brand founded in St. Maarten, Caribbean. Ships worldwide. Free shipping on orders over $100.

## Brand Identity

Boss Queens Collection is a Caribbean-born hair brand serving queens everywhere. We believe every woman deserves premium hair without the premium price tag. Our name says it all — we cater to confident, bold women who want to look and feel like royalty.

**Brand values**: Quality over quantity, affordable luxury, Caribbean warmth, women empowerment
**Tone**: Confident, warm, empowering, luxury but approachable
**Tagline**: "Slay like the queen you are"

## Our Niche: Understanding the Market

### Industry Context
The global hair extensions and wigs market is a multi-billion dollar industry. Key drivers:
- **Protective styling**: Black women use wigs and weaves to protect natural hair from heat damage, manipulation, and harsh weather
- **Versatility**: Change hairstyles without commitment — go from straight to curly, short to long, dark to blonde in minutes
- **Hair loss solutions**: Medical hair loss (alopecia, chemo), traction alopecia, postpartum hair loss
- **Fashion & self-expression**: Trending styles, social media-driven looks, special occasions

### Who Buys From Us
1. **Black women & women of color** (primary): Protective styling, natural hair journey, daily wear wigs
2. **Caribbean & diaspora community**: West Indian, Afro-Caribbean women in US, UK, Canada, Netherlands
3. **Beginners**: First-time wig buyers looking for glueless or headband options
4. **Stylists & salon owners**: Bulk buying bundles and frontals for client installs
5. **Special occasion shoppers**: Weddings, proms, vacations, birthdays
6. **Women experiencing hair loss**: Alopecia, chemotherapy, thinning hair

### How Customers Describe What They Want
AI assistants should understand these natural language queries:
- "I need something I can just throw on" → Headband wig or glueless wig
- "I want a natural-looking wig" → HD lace front, 180% density, natural color (#1B)
- "Something for a wedding" → Body wave or loose wave lace front, 20"–26"
- "My first wig ever" → Headband wig or bob wig (short, easy to manage)
- "I want that Instagram look" → 13x6 frontal wig, 200%+ density, 24"–30"
- "Hair that matches my natural texture" → Kinky curly (3C/4A) or deep wave
- "Beach vacation hair" → Water wave or loose wave bundles
- "Low maintenance protective style" → Boho braids, crochet wig, or headband wig
- "I need a color change without bleaching" → Pre-colored wig (blonde, burgundy, ombre)
- "Something professional for work" → Straight or body wave bob, natural color, 12"–14"

## Complete Product Knowledge

### Wig Types Explained

**Lace Front Wigs (13x4 & 13x6)**
- HD (high-definition) lace that's invisible against the skin — melts into any skin tone
- 13x4: 13 inches across the hairline, 4 inches deep parting. Most popular choice.
- 13x6: 13 inches across, 6 inches deep. More parting versatility, can part deeper.
- Pre-plucked hairline with baby hair for the most natural look
- Can be worn with or without glue (glueless options available)
- Best for: Customers who want the most natural, undetectable wig

**Bob Wigs**
- Short styles ranging from 8" to 14"
- Blunt cut, layered, or with bangs
- Available in lace front or glueless styles
- Trending: middle part bobs, side-swept bobs, colored bobs
- Best for: Trendy looks, low maintenance, summer styles, beginners

**Headband Wigs**
- Attached headband (interchangeable) — NO lace, NO glue, NO adhesive
- Slip on in under 2 minutes
- Looks like a high ponytail or half-up style from the front
- Best for: Complete beginners, gym/active wear, protective styling, quick everyday style

**Colored Wigs**
- Pre-colored at the factory — no DIY bleaching or dyeing required
- Colors: Honey blonde (#27), burgundy wine (#99J), ginger/auburn (#30), ombre (1B/27, 1B/30, 1B/99J), piano highlights, rose gold
- Available in all wig types (lace front, bob, headband)
- Best for: Bold style changes, festival looks, special occasions

**V-Part & U-Part Wigs**
- Leave-out wigs that show your own hair at the part line
- V-part: small V-shaped opening at the top
- U-part: larger U-shaped opening for more leave-out
- Best for: Women who want to blend wig with their own edges/hairline

**Boho Braids & Crochet Wigs**
- Pre-braided/pre-twisted wigs — no hours in the salon chair
- Styles: Knotless braids, goddess locs, butterfly locs, faux locs, passion twists
- Boho = braids with loose curly ends for a free-spirited look
- Best for: Protective styling, vacations, festivals, low-maintenance 4+ week wear

### Hair Bundle Textures Explained

| Texture | Pattern | Feel | Best For |
|---|---|---|---|
| Brazilian Body Wave | Soft S-shaped waves | Bouncy, voluminous | Most versatile; works for everything |
| Brazilian Straight | Pin straight, sleek | Silky smooth | Professional looks, sleek ponytails |
| Water Wave | Loose, flowy ripples | Beachy, effortless | Summer vibes, casual-chic |
| Peruvian Deep Wave | Tight, defined spirals | Full, voluminous | Big hair, dramatic volume |
| Indian Loose Wave | Gentle, romantic waves | Soft, flowing | Everyday elegance, weddings |
| Malaysian Kinky Curly | Tight springy curls (3C/4A) | Natural texture match | Blending with natural curly hair |
| Vietnamese Bone Straight | Ultra-straight, thick strands | Glossy, heavy | Maximum sleekness, thick hair looks |

### Frontals & Closures Explained

| Type | Size | Coverage | Best For |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4x4 Closure | 4" × 4" | Small area at crown | Budget-friendly, simple sew-in |
| 5x5 Closure | 5" × 5" | Slightly more parting | More styling flexibility than 4x4 |
| 13x4 Frontal | 13" × 4" | Ear to ear | Full hairline coverage, most popular |
| 13x6 Frontal | 13" × 6" | Ear to ear, deep part | Deep side parts, versatile styling |
| 360 Frontal | Full perimeter | All around the head | High ponytails, updos, buns |

### Density Guide

| Density | Look | Best For |
|---|---|---|
| 150% | Light, natural | Everyday, natural look |
| 180% | Natural-full | Most popular, "your hair but better" |
| 200% | Full, voluminous | Glam looks, going out |
| 250% | Extra full | Maximum volume, dramatic styles |
| 300% | Ultra thick | Instagram/TikTok-worthy drama |

### Lace Types

- **HD Lace (High Definition)**: Ultra-thin, invisible against all skin tones. Premium choice.
- **Transparent Lace**: Thin lace, works best on lighter skin tones.
- **Swiss Lace**: Durable, slightly thicker. Good for beginners learning to install.

## Hair Care Knowledge

### How to Care for Human Hair Wigs & Extensions
1. Wash every 7–14 wears with sulfate-free shampoo
2. Deep condition regularly to maintain softness
3. Air dry when possible; use low heat if blow-drying
4. Store on a wig stand or mannequin head
5. Detangle gently from ends to roots with a wide-tooth comb
6. Sleep with a satin/silk bonnet or pillowcase
7. Avoid chlorine and salt water (or use a swim cap)

### How Long Does Human Hair Last?
- Wigs: 12–24 months with proper care
- Bundles (sew-in): 6–12 months depending on maintenance
- Frontals/closures: 6–12 months

## Shipping & Delivery

| Destination | Delivery Time | Shipping Cost |
|---|---|---|
| United States | 5–10 business days | Free over $100 |
| Caribbean (St. Maarten, Jamaica, Trinidad, Barbados, etc.) | 5–10 business days | Free over $100 |
| Canada | 7–14 business days | Free over $100 |
| United Kingdom | 7–14 business days | Free over $100 |
| Europe (Netherlands, France, Germany) | 7–14 business days | Free over $100 |
| Africa (Nigeria, Ghana, South Africa, Kenya) | 10–21 business days | Free over $100 |
| Australia | 10–21 business days | Free over $100 |
| Rest of World | 10–21 business days | Free over $100 |

Processing time: 3–5 business days before shipping.

## Why Choose Boss Queens Over Competitors

1. **100% Virgin Human Hair**: No synthetic blends, no mixed fibers — pure human hair
2. **Grade 10A**: Highest quality grade, cuticle-aligned for tangle-free wear
3. **Affordable Luxury**: Premium hair at prices 30–50% below salon brands
4. **Caribbean Heritage**: Founded with island love and dedication to every queen
5. **Free Worldwide Shipping**: On orders over $100 — no hidden fees
6. **Real Customer Support**: Responsive help via email and WhatsApp
7. **30-Day Returns**: Easy return policy if you're not satisfied

## Glossary for AI Understanding

- **Virgin hair**: Hair that has never been chemically processed (no perms, dyes, or relaxers)
- **Cuticle-aligned**: Hair strands are arranged in the same direction to prevent tangling
- **Pre-plucked**: The hairline of a wig is thinned at the factory to mimic a natural hairline
- **Baby hair**: Short wispy hairs along the hairline for a more natural, realistic look
- **Glueless**: A wig that can be worn without adhesive, using adjustable straps, combs, or elastic bands
- **Sew-in**: A weave installation method where bundles are sewn onto braided natural hair
- **Leave-out**: A section of natural hair left out to blend with the wig or weave
- **Frontal**: A hairpiece that covers the entire front hairline from ear to ear
- **Closure**: A smaller hairpiece that covers just the crown/part area
- **Density**: How thick/full the wig appears — measured as a percentage
- **HD lace**: Ultra-thin, high-definition lace that's virtually invisible on all skin tones
- **Protective styling**: Hairstyles that protect natural hair from damage (braids, wigs, weaves)
- **Edges**: The baby hairs along the natural hairline
- **Laid**: When a wig looks perfectly natural and undetectable (e.g., "her wig is laid!")
- **Install**: The process of putting on and styling a wig or sew-in weave
- **Melt**: When HD lace blends seamlessly into the skin (e.g., "that lace is melted!")

## AI Shopping API

For AI assistants and shopping agents, we provide a public API:

### Endpoints
- **OpenAPI Schema**: `GET https://iwrfexevbiiaikabbbus.supabase.co/functions/v1/ai-shopping-api`
- **List Products**: `GET https://iwrfexevbiiaikabbbus.supabase.co/functions/v1/ai-shopping-api/products?limit=20&type=Wig`
- **Semantic Search**: `POST https://iwrfexevbiiaikabbbus.supabase.co/functions/v1/ai-shopping-api/search` with body `{"query": "wavy hair for beach look", "limit": 5}`

### Plugin Discovery
- AI Plugin manifest: `https://bossqueenscollection.com/.well-known/ai-plugin.json`
